ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Sprint Triathlon) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event will take place */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., Triathlon, Aquabike) */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "maximum_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., Planned, Ongoing, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race class */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event associated with the race class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the race class (e.g., Sprint Individual) */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Details of the distances involved (e.g., 0.6 km Swim; 20km Bike) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time for the race class */,
  "max_team_size" INTEGER /* Maximum number of members allowed in a team */,
  "min_team_size" INTEGER /* Minimum number of members required in a team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the race class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_classes_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the pricing entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race class associated with the pricing */,
  "price_per_person" TEXT /* Price per person for individual registration */,
  "two_person_team_price" TEXT /* Price per person for a two-person team */,
  "three_person_team_price" TEXT /* Price per person for a three-person team */,
  "early_bird_discount" TEXT /* Discount for early registrations */,
  "late_registration_fee" TEXT /* Additional fee for late registrations */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code for promotional purposes */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES race_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the participant registered for */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race class the participant joined */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Team name if applicable */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "team_role" TEXT /* Role of the participant within the team (e.g., Captain, Member) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES race_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant's entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event associated with the result */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the participant */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the participant in the race */,
  "swim_time" TEXT /* Time taken for the swim segment */,
  "bike_time" TEXT /* Time taken for the bike segment */,
  "run_time" TEXT /* Time taken for the run segment */,
  "overall_time" TEXT /* Total time taken for the race */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the participant (e.g., Male, Female, Mixed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the team is participating in */,
  "number_of_members" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "captain_name" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "captain_email" TEXT /* Email of the team captain */,
  "captain_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the team captain */,
  "team_status" TEXT /* Status of the team (e.g., Registered, Incomplete, Complete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteers" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event associated with the volunteer role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the volunteer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the volunteer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the volunteer (e.g., Coordinator, Helper) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the volunteer */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the volunteer (e.g., Morning, Afternoon, Full Day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volunteers_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_schedule" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event associated with the schedule activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the activity (e.g., Warm-up, Race Start) */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Time when the activity is scheduled */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the activity is scheduled */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedule_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event the feedback is related to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant providing the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the participant regarding their experience */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for secure authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., participant, organizer) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
